## Type of Change

## Checklist
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] No debug code or hardcoded secrets left in
- [ ] Tests added or updated (run `pytest`)
- [ ] API docs updated if endpoints changed (API.md)
- [ ] Tested locally with Docker compose
